metadata.description: AI-agent skills for extracting structured brand packages from client assets — Figma variables, live website CSS, social copy, brand-guide PDFs, and reference screenshots — into a .brand/ directory plus a spec-compliant design.md and project-root brand.md.

plugins.name: brand-context
plugins.description: Generate complete brand context for AI agents from a client's existing assets. Pipeline: Figma tokens, web tokens, voice extraction, multimodal overview, conflict detection, design-system repo scan. Writes a structured .brand/ directory plus design.md and brand.md at the project root. Slash commands: /brand-context:extract and /brand-context:check. Playwright MCP recommended; falls back to native WebFetch when absent.
